data.title: Blackstone sees boost in global dealmaking with IPO and M&A activity "accelerating," reporting 40% surge in global IPO issuance and 2.5 times increase in the U.S. alone during 4Q.
data.description: Blackstone Inc. reports a significant increase in global dealmaking activity, pointing to accelerating IPO and M&A activity following a multi-year freeze. COO Jonathan Gray highlighted three key dynamics propelling this growth: the reopening of deal cycles, rising investments in AI, and increasing adoption of private markets. Blackstone anticipates a resurgence in business after a period of subdued transaction activity, with IPO issuance surging by 40% year-over-year in Q4, including a 250% increase in the U.S. This news was shared during the company's fourth-quarter earnings call.
CHINA PLANS $29 BILLION CAPITAL INJECTION INTO BIGGEST INSURERS

data.title: Bitfinex Bitcoin longs reach peak since late 2023, sparking hopes for $100K surge. Traders wary as margin longs hit 2-year high amid market downturn.
data.description: Margin long positions for Bitcoin on the Bitfinex exchange have surged to a level not seen in two years, just before a significant downturn in both stock and cryptocurrency markets. Traders are now faced with the question of whether to anticipate a potential rally or if the current correction will persist. The increase in margin longs indicates a high level of bullish sentiment, but the recent market volatility suggests some caution may be warranted. It remains to be seen how these factors will influence the future direction of Bitcoin and other assets.

data.title: Avalanche's tokenization peaked in Q4 as BlackRock's BUIDL expanded on-chain. Despite millions invested, its token dropped 60% in Q4 2025.
data.description: According to data from Messari, institutional investors injected millions of dollars into Avalanche in the previous year. However, despite this significant funding, the value of its token plummeted by almost 60% in the fourth quarter of 2025.

data.title: HCLSoftware predicts AI autonomy will transform enterprises by 2026 after 8 months of research and insights from 173 sources.
data.description: Recently, HCLSoftware, a renowned enterprise software solutions provider, launched its Tech Trends 2026 report after conducting extensive research over 8 months and gathering insights from 173 sources. The unveiling took place in Santa Clara, Calif. and NOIDA, India. HCLSoftware, listed on both NSE under the ticker HCLTECH.NS and BSE under HCLTECH.BO, is recognized as a global leader in the industry. The report is anticipated to provide valuable industry insights and forecasts for the future.

data.title: Electrolux Group's Q4 2025 saw net sales at SEK 35,112m, organic sales growth of 2.0% and operating income of SEK 1,517m.
data.description: In the fourth quarter of 2025, in Stockholm, there was a notable financial report with the following key points. Net sales for this period were approximately SEK 35,112 million, showing a slight decrease from the previous quarter's gross of SEK 37,968 million. The organic sales growth was reported at 2.0%, a significant decline from the prior period's 11.5%. This growth was attributed to increased sales volumes and a positive mix of products offered. Operating income also saw an improvement, reaching SEK 1,517 million compared to the previous quarter's SEK 1,052 million. These numbers suggest a positive trend in the company's financial performance.

data.title: Warsh expected to be named Fed chair by Trump on Friday. Known to favor Bitcoin as a monitoring tool for fiscal policy.
data.description: Kevin Warsh, who is considered a potential Federal Reserve chair due to his hawkish views, has previously stated that Bitcoin has the potential to act as a form of accountability for fiscal policy choices.

data.title: Galderma reveals global survey findings on menopause's impact on skin at IMCAS 2026; 50% women learn skin effects through experience in their 40s.
data.description: In Zug, Switzerland, Galderma (SIX: GALD) presented results from a worldwide study involving peri- and post-menopausal women from nine nations at the International Master Course on Aging Science (IMCAS) 2026 World Congress in Paris, France, held from January 29-31, 2026. The survey highlighted that more than 50% of women became aware of the skin effects of menopause through personal experience, with the majority discovering these changes during their 40s.
